label: Monocyte precursor
evidence: The Gopee et al. (2024) atlas abbreviation list includes GMP = granulocyte-monocyte progenitors and YSMP = yolk-sac derived myeloid-biased progenitors. Suo et al. (2022) detected myeloid progenitors including GMPs in non-haematopoietic organs such as skin, spleen, and kidney, indicating that monocyte precursors are present in prenatal skin and capable of local haematopoiesis.
